description: Create a Chat activity named 'Alpha Team Coordination' in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. Set the description to 'Weekly sync for Project Team Alpha members.' Schedule the next session for the upcoming Friday at 14:00, repeating weekly at the same time. Configure the activity to save past sessions for 180 days and restrict access exclusively to members of the 'Project Team Alpha' group. Login as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!).
